visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with white text, located in the front.
A white can with 'Milkis' written on it. This is interpreted as the target 'sprite'. It is behind the red soda can.
A black can labeled 'SODA WATER' to the left of the other cans.
A brown plastic bottle with a green cap, to the right of the white can.
The wooden surface on which all the items are placed.

action_plan.explanation: The red soda can is in front of and blocking access to the white soda can.
Pick the primary target now that the obstructing red can has been moved.
